message:
🐛 Prevent generator from producing kubectl edit deployment placeholders (#1465)

- Add explicit rule in LLM system prompt forbidding generic kubectl edit steps
- Add isPlaceholderStep() filter that strips any kubectl edit deployment steps
  from generated missions before they're written to disk
- Filter both mission steps and resolution codeSnippets

This prevents the quality issue where auto-generated missions included
non-actionable "kubectl edit deployment" placeholder steps.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
